positive: Minimalist symmetrical forest landscape featuring stylized, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central view of a majestic, oversized fern structure dominating the composition. Color palette must be deep indigo, electric teal, luminous cyan, and hints of soft violet, contrasted against a deep midnight background. Clean silhouettes, high contrast, vector illustration style, perfect for apparel print. Overhead symmetry, symmetrical composition, rule of thirds incorporated into the central structure, cinematic depth of field, hyper-detailed line work, concept art, clean edges, studio lighting, print-ready, negative space utilization.
